nasb.text: You shall make a covering for the tent of rams’ skins dyed red and a covering of porpoise skins above.

esv.text: And you shall make for the tent a covering of tanned rams’ skins and a covering of goatskins on top.

cnv.text: 你又要用染紅的公羊皮做帳棚的頂蓋，在上面再蓋上海狗皮。

ccb.text: 罩棚上面要盖一层染成红色的公羊皮，再盖一层海狗皮做顶盖。
